completion_summary: Added a read-only vNext staging classifier and local gate that separates diagnostic additions, runtime additions, and runtime replacements; requires completed claims for readiness; blocks diagnostic replacement claims; and prevents staging evidence from changing v0.3 runtime or maturity.
notes: Staging is read-only with respect to v0.3. A diagnostic proposal cannot raise runtime maturity, and an active claim cannot be marked integration-ready.
scope: Classify accepted adapter proposals into pending, diagnostic-only, additive runtime, and replacement integration plans without changing World Law v0.3
